key_assumptions.source: FY2026 operating cash flow $2452.0M less capital spending $43.0M ÷ 215.0M diluted shares per ADSK/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260303_rpt20260131_acc0000769397_26_000015.htm
Subscription renewals + construction cloud upsell; RPO converts steadily

open_questions: Starboard activist campaign (Mar 2025): governance and margin thesis — promote to stance input?
SBC normalization: should base FCF per share be reduced for recurring dilution?
Construction cycle: is FY2026 revenue +18% peak-cycle or sustainable run-rate?
No approved third-party sources in base IRR; re-scan when Substacks added.
thesis: Autodesk makes design and engineering software for architects, builders, manufacturers, and media creators. **[Fact]** FY2026 revenue was **$6.74 billion**, up **18%** year over year from **$5.72 billion** in FY2025. **[Fact]** The company has largely completed its shift from perpetual licenses to **subscription and maintenance** revenue. **[Fact]** FY2026 operating cash flow was **$2.45 billion** minus capital spending of **$43 million**, yielding free cash flow of about **$2.41 billion** on **215 million** diluted shares (**~$11.20** per share). **[Fact]** Remaining performance obligation (contract backlog) stood at **$8.3 billion** at January 31, 2026. **[Inference]** Autodesk earns by selling sticky, workflow-embedded tools (AutoCAD, Revit, Fusion, Civil 3D) where file formats, training, and project libraries create switching costs.
why_market_wrong: The stock trades near **20 times** FY2026 free cash flow per share while revenue grew **18%** and subscription transition risks have faded. **[Inference]** The market may be overweighting **construction-cycle slowdown** and **open-source competition** while underweighting **RPO conversion** and **construction cloud upsell**. **[Fact]** Starboard Value filed activist proxy materials in March 2025 seeking board engagement on margins and capital allocation (context tier only; not in base IRR). **[Inference]** No dated Horizon Kinetics predictive attribute exists; the edge is **quality subscription compounder at a full but not extreme multiple**, not a catalyst with a known payoff date.
